title: Xali's Potions Addon & More
description: Resource Pack that adds Xali's Potions parity with Deeper & Darker, Fixed Minecraft, and Gravity Changer. Requires CIT or Optifine.
body:
A resourcepack that adds parity with [Xali's Potions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-potions) for the mods [Deeper & Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker), [Fixed Minecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/fixed), and [Gravity Changer API (Fork)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravity-api-fork).

### Deeper and Darker
-Changes sculk potion textures
### Fixed Minecraft
-Changes blindness and levitation potions
### Gravity Changer API (Fork)
-Changes gravity potion textures
-Changes other item & textures within the mod
-Adds English localization for strength reverse potion effect and effect arrows

**Requires [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) (or another CIT mod) or Optifine, however only tested with CIT Resewn on MC Version 1.20.4 Fabric**

For primary usage in [Just Not Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/modpack/just-not-vanilla) modpack.
